title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Tourist Packages
text:
# Tourist Packages Details of Tourist Package | Package Name | Duration | Description | AC Car | AC Coach |
| Explore Tripura | 8 (eight) days/ 7 (seven) nights | Day-1: Received from Agartala Airport/Railway Station – Agartala local sight seeing (State Museum – Ujjayanta Palace – MBB Collage – Pubassa – Jagannath Temple – Umamaheswari Temple – Heritage Park – Nagicherra Rubber Wood Processing Centre – Laxminarayan Temple – Venuban Bihar – Durgabari Tea Garden – Capital Complex – Akhaura Integrated Check Post) – night halt at Geetanjali Tourism Guest House, Kunjaban – Day-2: Started from Geetanjali Tourism Guest House, Kunjaban, Agartala – visit Chaturdash Devta Temple, Khayerpur – visit Jumpai Hills – night halt at EdenTourist Lodge, Vangmun – Day-3: Jumpai Hill Sightseeing – visit Unakoti Archaeological Sight – night halt at Unakoti Tourist Lodge, Kailashahar – Day-4: Started from Unakoti Tourist Lodge, Kailashahar – visit Baramura Eco Park – visit Khumulwng Eco Park – visit Kamalasagar Kasba Kali Temple – night halt at Commila view Tourist Lodge, Kamalasagar – Day-5: Started from Commila view Tourist Lodge, Kamalasagar – visit Dumboor Lake (Coconut Island) – visit Chabimura – night halt at Gunabati Yatri Niwas, Matabari/ Gomati Yatri Niwas, Udaipur – Day-6- Started from Gunabati Yatri Niwas, Matabari/ Gomati Yatri Niwas, Udaipur – visit Tripura Sundari Temple, Matabari – Udaipur local sight seeing (Bhubaneswari Temple – Gunabati Group of Temple – Six Lakes – Tepania Eco Park) – visit Pilak – visit Trishna Wildlife Sanctuary & Butterfly Park – visit Maitree Udyan Park – night halt at Sagarmahal Tourist Lodge, Melaghar – Day-7 – Started from Sagarmahal Tourist Lodge, Melaghar – visit Neermahal Water Palace – visit Sepahijala Wildlife Sanctuary – night halt at Geetanjali Tourism Guest House, Kunjaban, Agartala – Day-8 – See-off to Agartala Airport/ Railway Station. | Rs. 11,000/- per head | Rs.
